# CWE-917 positive: user-controlled template expression (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-917-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-917: Expression Language Injection via text/template built from request input.
// Vulnerable: filter query parameter is concatenated into the template source.

import (
	"bytes"
	"net/http"
	"text/template"
)

func RenderReportPure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		title := r.URL.Query().Get("title")
		expr := r.URL.Query().Get("filter")
		src := "{{.Title}} where " + expr
		tmpl, err := template.New("report").Parse(src)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		var buf bytes.Buffer
		data := map[string]string{"Title": title}
		if err := tmpl.Execute(&buf, data); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/plain")
		w.Write(buf.Bytes())
	}
}
